content.en:
The Sword One Lord of the Heavenly Sword Clan is the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, and it is normal for Ye Tian not to see it, but he can visit the other two Legendary Realm Lords of the Heavenly Sword Clan!

The other two Legendary Realm Lords of the Heavenly Sword Clan were just ordinary Legendary Realm Lords, but they didn't have the arrogance of the Sword One Lord, if Ye Tian went to visit these two Legendary Realm Lords, he still had hope of entering the Heavenly Sword Clan's territory.

"Let's visit Lord Motoko!"

Ye Tian decided.

Lord Yuanzi is an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, and he is also one of the three Legendary Realm Lords of the Heavenly Sword Clan.

So on this day, Ye Tian came outside the Heavenly Sword Clan.

Due to the distance from the core of the Heavenly Sword Clan, Ye Tian only copied the sword dao talents of some nearby Heavenly Sword Clans.

"There are not many Heavenly Sword Clan clansmen with legendary-level sword dao ancestors. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he still copied the talent of these Heavenly Sword Clansmen.

"There is really no holy land, Endless Lord, come to visit Lord Yuanzi. "

Ye Tian reported his identity and said.

He didn't go through the long river of time and went directly to the Lord of Yuanzi.

If he dared to step into the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan in the way that the long river of time entered, I am afraid that he would directly offend the sword lord, and maybe the other party would slash over with a sword and directly kill Ye Tian's replica body.

Therefore, just visit honestly.

Soon, the Yuanzi of the Heavenly Sword Clan learned that a Legendary Realm Lord had come to visit him.

"Endless Lord?"

Lord Yuanzi felt that the name was very unfamiliar, and he didn't know who the Endless Lord was, so he went to check it out, and this time he was quite surprised.

"A newly promoted Legendary Realm Lord, and his cultivation speed is very fast, he quickly broke through from the Legendary Lord to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm. Lord Yuanzi pondered for a moment and decided to meet again.

With such a talented Legendary Realm Lord, maybe there is hope to enter the Peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm in the future, and it is not bad to get to know him.

Then he conveyed the order to let Ye Tian enter the Heavenly Sword Clan.

Soon, Ye Tian was led by a half-step Legendary Realm Lord to the Yuanzi Lord's cultivation treasure land.

And after entering the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan, Ye Tian turned on the copying talent with all his might, copying the sword talent of one Heavenly Sword Clansman.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to the residence of the Yuanzi Lord, that is, the Yuanzi Realm of the Heavenly Sword Clan.

This place is named after the Lord of Yuanzi, and there are many, many Heavenly Sword clansmen in the Yuanzi Realm.

"That's right, now you can copy a lot of legendary sword path ancestors here. "

Ye Tian was happy in his heart, but he didn't show it.

"I've seen Lord Yuanzi. "

Ye Tian said.

"Endless Lord, please be seated!" Lord Yuanzi was also quite polite.

Ye Tian sat down, mainly to get to know each other, and by the way, ask for advice on kendo. "

"Does the Endless Lord also study kendo?" the Yuanli Lord became interested.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Lord Yuanzi began to discuss the way of the sword.

Ye Tian does have a good opinion on the way of the sword, although he is not as good as the Lord of Yuanli, but at least he will not lose face.

This discussion has been going on for many years.

On this day, Ye Tian said: "Lord Yuanzi, I see that the sword spirit of the Heavenly Sword Clan is very good, and I want to travel here, I don't know if I can?"

"There's no problem, but the Endless Lord still has to pay attention, there are some places where people from the outside world are not allowed to go, otherwise I will anger the Sword One Lord, and I won't be able to intercede. "

"Lord Yuanzi, I understand. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Immediately, Ye Tian wandered openly in the territory of the Heavenly Sword Clan, seemingly wandering, but in fact copying the Heavenly Sword Clan's one-door kendo talent.

Some years passed, and Ye Tian had almost copied all the legendary sword dao ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Clan.

"It's almost there!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was going to leave the Heavenly Sword Clan and go back to fuse these legendary sword path ancestors, which should be able to be fused into a legendary-level sword path ancestor family.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Heavenly Sword Clan and returned to the True Saintless Land.

......

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian began to fuse the legendary sword ancestor of one gate, and as time passed, the legendary sword ancestor of one gate fused, making Ye Tian's legendary sword ancestor more and more powerful

After a long time, Ye Tian fused a large number of legendary sword path ancestors, and finally made a qualitative change in the legendary sword path ancestors.

Airplanes!!!!

The Legendary Kendo Ancestor was promoted to the Legendary Kendo Ancestor.

"Finally it worked!"

Ye Tian was quite excited, with the legendary kendo ancestor, it would be much easier for him to comprehend kendo in the future.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the three thousand kites, sat on the scales that could assist in the comprehension of the kendo, and began to comprehend the kendo.

Suddenly, Ye Tian comprehended the sword path at an extremely fast speed.

After a while.

"'It's so good!'"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

At this speed of comprehension, it seems that it does not take too long for him to master the way of the sword, perhaps tens of millions of eternal years, he will be sure to master the way of the sword.

And for the Legendary Realm Lord, tens of millions of eternal years are really nothing.

So, in the following years, a copy of Ye Tian's body has been here to comprehend kendo.

Time passed slowly, and before you knew it, tens of millions of eternal years had passed.

Three thousand kites, on the scales of kendo cultivation.

Ye Tian's body suddenly transmitted a sword path breath, this is not an ordinary sword path breath, and all sword ways are the breath of control.

Ye Tian, control the way of the sword!

At this moment, the other Legendary Realm Lords and Half-Step Legendary Realm Lords who were cultivating were shocked.

"What, the Endless Lord has taken control of the Kendo Barrier!!"

Lord Longgu (Deli Zhao) was shocked.

This speed is too fast, although controlling the sword path cannot improve cultivation, it is still an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, and the difficulty of controlling the space cannot be compared at all, but Ye Tiancai has not been long after entering the Legendary Realm Lord!

So quickly, Ye Tian had mastered the way of the sword, if he mastered the other ways, wouldn't it be very hopeful that he would be able to control the space all at once in the future?

"Perhaps, Ye Tianhui is the first lord of our True Saintless Land to become the peak of the Legendary Realm. The Dragon Ancient Lord and the other Legendary Realm Lords thought so in their hearts.

These Legendary Realm Lords were all envious, but they could only be envious.

After all, they are not Ye Tian, and they can't make such progress as Ye Tian.

Subsequently, they continued to cultivate one by one and stopped paying attention.

After a period of time, Ye Tiancai firmly controlled the way of the sword.

Mastering kendo is not a lot of strength for him, but it is a new beginning. _
